title: PHASE 35 — AGGRESSIVE ZERO-CLICK + INDEXING REPAIR — FINAL REPORT
root_cause: CONTENT ARCHITECTURE FAILURE — Tool variant pages outrank parent calculators 15-42x with exact-match titles (e.g. '$100,000 at 5% for 20 Years'). Google scrapes the answer from the variant H1/title/snippet, user gets answer without clicking. Parent calculators have generic titles and near-zero impressions. Blog gives exact answer in first H2. /all-pages utility page ranks in SERP.
fix_strategy: Noindex cannibal pages → remove from sitemap → GSC temporary removal → strengthen parent signals → repair blog snippet → shift internal link authority → request recrawl of priority pages.

files_changed: src/app/all-pages/page.tsx — added robots: { index: false, follow: true }
src/app/calculators/[slug]/page.tsx — strengthened 3 parent calculator titles in ctrTitles
src/app/tools/[slug]/page.tsx — added above-fold parent calculator link for formula variants
src/lib/blog/posts.ts — restructured 20k loan blog (curiosity hook + CTA before answer)

parent_compound_interest.title_before: See Your Money Grow: Compound Interest Calculator (2026)
parent_compound_interest.title_after: Compound Interest Calculator — See How $100K Grows to $265K in 20 Years

parent_mortgage_calculator.title_before: Calculate Your Monthly Payment: Free Mortgage Calculator (2026)
parent_mortgage_calculator.title_after: Mortgage Calculator — See Your Monthly Payment on Any Home ($200K, $500K, $900K)

parent_loan_calculator.title_before: Plan Any Loan: Free Monthly Payment Calculator (2026)
parent_loan_calculator.title_after: Loan Calculator — Calculate Any Monthly Payment: Personal, Auto, Student Loans

blog_20k_loan.h2_after: Borrowing $20,000 at 8%? Here's What Your Bank Won't Tell You
blog_20k_loan.first_paragraph_before: If you borrow $20,000 for 5 years at 8%, your monthly payment is $405.53...
blog_20k_loan.first_paragraph_after: A $20,000 loan at 8% for 5 years sounds straightforward — but the total interest, hidden fees, and amortization schedule can surprise you...
blog_20k_loan.answer_location: Moved to 2nd H2 — below curiosity hook and calculator CTA

tool_variants.new_addition: Above-fold 'Try the full calculator →' link to parent

temporary_removals.debug_note: V1-V2 failed: typed URL into sidebar 'Inspect URL' field instead of form's placeholder='Enter URL' input. V3 fixed: exact placeholder targeting + 'Next' button click + 'Submit request' confirmation.
temporary_removals.verification: GSC page no longer shows 'No requests submitted in the last 6 months'

sitemap_resubmission.status: HTTP 204 — SUBMITTED via GSC Webmasters API

results.blog_h2: PASS — 'What Your Bank Won't Tell You' as first H2
results.no_regressions: PASS — footer, nav, editorial, methodology intact

expected_outcomes.week_1: Parent calculator impressions begin rising as variants de-index. 20k blog CTR > 0%.
failure_signals: Parent impressions don't rise after variant de-index
20k blog CTR stays 0% after snippet fix
DNI spike on parent calculator pages

decision_escalation.day_3: Pull fresh GSC — check for recrawl signals, parent impression movement
decision_escalation.day_7: If no movement: intensify internal links, re-check URL Inspection
decision_escalation.day_14: If no parent lift: start parent calculator content upgrade
decision_escalation.day_30: If no improvement: declare Phase 35 failed, pivot to Phase 36
